title: Ashen Legacy Glass
description: Reverts Ashen's glass textures to the legacy textures used prior to Ashen v1.7.2
body:
![About](https://i.imgur.com/nMG1TNv.png)

Did you prefer Ashen's original Glass textures? Do you not like the simpler, more vanilla-friendly glass textures introduced in Ashen v1.7.2? Well then this Add-On is for you!

This pack replaces the modern, 1.7.2+ Glass textures with the old, barred Glass textures. Simple as that.

Place this pack *above* Ashen in your load order.
___

This pack is designed and intended for use with [Ashen 16x](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ashen/).
___

[![Bisect Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/3c357293-8dfb-410a-a5e3-0d778833e154.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/aim-boot)
